tweets.text:
As AI agents begin managing treasury, payments, and tokenized assets, authorization alone is no longer sufficient.

Execution itself needs to operate within predefined constraints.

Vishwa’s Veta control system enforces those constraints before capital moves.
Combined with decentralized payment rails like x402, Vishwa enables a fully verifiable, frictionless ecosystem for agentic payments within programmable limits.

Meet Bill Wang, a Software Engineer Intern on the Cloudflare One - Access Team. From studying at the University of Waterloo to moving to Austin to help make an impact at a global scale, his work directly contributes to our infrastructure worldwide!\n\"I already use Cloudflare in my personal projects, so getting to contribute to tools I actually rely on is very rewarding.\" #CloudflareInternets

'APIs without payments are half-built'.

You shipped the endpoint, the auth, the rate limits, the docs. Then for the one thing that turns usage into revenue, you bolted on Stripe — or nothing at all. https://t.co/oZBzYlxPbL

Every API endpoint should be a potential revenue endpoint.

x402 + the PayAI Facilitator make that native: any route can require payment, per request, settled in stablecoins. No checkout.

Tell me I'm wrong ������
There should be a federal tax break for cars with NHTSA-rated FSD. \n\nEvery car company should have a massive incentive to get to Tesla/Waymo-level FSD as soon as possible.

New habit: when Tesla FSD is driving me somewhere, start a new Apple Voice Memo and just stream of conscious dictate whatever is on my mind for the entire ride.\n\nWhen back at my desk, Codex automatically converts to a transcript and takes a first pass at organizing into todos, emails, tweets, etc.
